title: neomammillaria cadereytensis
intro: Neomammillaria cadereytensis, also known as the Cadereyta pincushion cactus, is a species of cactus in the genus Neomammillaria. This plant is native to Mexico and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Neomammillaria cadereytensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and provide antioxidant protection. The plant is often prepared for herbal use by drying the stems and roots, which can then be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
